commit.message:
Fit all windows within 600 px height for small Haiku screens

- Reduced ExtractionWindow tips scroll area: 130→70 min, 180→90 max
- Reduced RoastColorWindow thumbnail: 320×240 → 320×180
- Reduced RoastColorWindow tips scroll: 130→70 min, 200→100 max
- Removed unnecessary 40px height buffer from all three windows' ResizeTo() calls
- Updated BRIEF.md to reflect thumbnail size changes and window optimization

All tool windows now fit within 600px total height (content + title bar + borders)
to accommodate smaller Haiku displays.

commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
fix(ci): download build artifacts to apps/ to match upload's common ancestor

actions/upload-artifact@v4 uses 'apps/' as the least common ancestor when
both apps/api/dist/ and apps/web/.next/ are specified. Artifact paths are
therefore api/dist/... and web/.next/... (without apps/ prefix).
Downloading to 'apps' restores files to the correct apps/api/dist/ location.

commit.message:
Auto-create GitHub release on tag push (#2)

## Summary
- Trigger publish workflow on tag push (`v*`) instead of release event
- Add a `release` job that auto-creates a GitHub Release with generated
notes
- `publish` job now runs after `release` completes
- Add `memory_protocol` module and `CLAUDE.md`

## Flow
`git tag v0.2.0 && git push origin v0.2.0` → creates release → publishes
to PyPI

## Test plan
- [ ] Merge PR
- [ ] Push a new tag (e.g. `v0.2.0`)
- [ ] Verify GitHub Release is auto-created
- [ ] Verify package is published to PyPI

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

ci: implement fast-checks-first pattern for all workflows (#348)

* chore(deps): bump the rust-major group with 3 updates

Bumps the rust-major group with 3 updates: [redb](https://github.com/cberner/redb), [rand](https://github.com/rust-random/rand) and [rand_chacha](https://github.com/rust-random/rand).


Updates `redb` from 2.6.3 to 3.1.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/cberner/redb/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/cberner/redb/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/cberner/redb/compare/v2.6.3...v3.1.0)

Updates `rand` from 0.8.5 to 0.10.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/compare/0.8.5...0.10.0)

Updates `rand_chacha` from 0.3.1 to 0.9.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/rust-random/rand/compare/rand_chacha-0.3.1...0.9.0)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: redb
  dependency-version: 3.1.0
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-major
  dependency-group: rust-major
- dependency-name: rand
  dependency-version: 0.10.0
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
  dependency-group: rust-major
- dependency-name: rand_chacha
  dependency-version: 0.9.0
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
  dependency-group: rust-major
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

* fix(deps): resolve rust-major breaking changes for redb 3.x and rand 0.10

- Add ReadableDatabase trait import for redb 3.x begin_read() method
- Update rand API: thread_rng() -> rng(), gen() -> random(), gen_range() -> random_range()
- Update rand_chacha to 0.10 for compatibility
- Document breaking changes in AGENTS.md and agent_docs/code_conventions.md
- Update plans/ACTIONS.md with learning delta

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): run benchmarks on push to main when quick-check is skipped

The benchmark workflow was skipping all jobs on push to main because:
- check-quick-check only runs on pull_request events (skipped on push)
- benchmark job depends on check-quick-check but didn't handle skipped result
- When a dependency is skipped, downstream jobs skip by default

Fix: Use always() in the conditional to evaluate even when the
dependency was skipped, allowing benchmarks to run on main branch pushes.

* docs(ci): add job dependency pattern to prevent skipped jobs

Documents the `always()` pattern for GitHub Actions when upstream
jobs are conditionally skipped. This prevents the issue where
downstream jobs skip unexpectedly when their dependency is skipped
(e.g., PR-only jobs on push events).

* fix(ci): remove trailing spaces from benchmarks.yml

* fix(benches): update rand API for 0.10 compatibility

* fix(benches): fix formatting

* fix(deps): complete rand 0.10 API migration in all crates

- Fix remaining rand API usage in benches/concurrent_operations.rs
- Fix rand API usage in tests/load/cache_load_test.rs
- Update AGENTS.md with comprehensive upgrade process and search command

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: implement fast-checks-first pattern for all workflows

- Add push trigger to quick-check.yml for main/develop branches
- Remove duplicate 'essential' job from ci.yml (format/clippy/doctest)
- Add check-quick-check dependency to ci.yml, coverage.yml, security.yml,
  file-structure.yml, and yaml-lint.yml
- All expensive jobs now wait for quick-check to pass before running
- Skip quick-check wait for Dependabot to avoid timeout issues

This implements 2026 best practices for CI/CD pipelines:
- Fast checks (format, clippy, doctest) run first (~5-10 min)
- Expensive jobs (tests, coverage, security) only run after fast checks pass
- Saves CI resources and provides faster feedback on failures

---------

commit.message:
Add Contact page with all details; update Contact nav link

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add SceneManager for multiple worlds/scenes support (#442)

* feat(ecs): add SceneManager for multiple worlds/scenes support

Introduces SceneManager to manage multiple isolated ECS worlds (scenes).
Each scene has its own World with independent entities, components, and
archetypes. A "default" scene is auto-created and set active.

Replaces the single `world: World` field in both GoudGame and GoudContext
with a SceneManager, while preserving full backward compatibility through
proxy methods that delegate to the default scene.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(ffi): add scene management FFI exports

Expose SceneManager operations through the FFI boundary: create, destroy,
lookup by name, active state management, scene count, and current scene
targeting. All functions follow existing FFI patterns with null checks,
SAFETY comments, and error propagation via set_last_error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(ffi): split scene FFI tests into separate file

Keep scene.rs under 500-line limit by extracting tests to scene_tests.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: apply cargo fmt formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ecs): move SceneManager to core layer and update active scenes per frame

SceneManager, SceneId, and DEFAULT_SCENE_NAME now live in core::scene,
fixing the architecture violation where context_registry (core infra)
depended on sdk::scene. The sdk::scene module re-exports from core for
backward compatibility.

The game loop (run/update_frame) now iterates all active scenes each
frame instead of only the default scene. This is backward-compatible:
with only the default scene active, behavior is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix import ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ecs): validate scene ID in set_current_scene

Return Result<(), GoudError> instead of silently accepting invalid IDs,
preventing potential panics in world()/world_mut().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add scene FFI functions to codegen pipeline

Register scene.rs in FFI_SOURCE_FILES, add 8 scene functions to
ffi_manifest.json, ffi_mapping.json, and goud_sdk.schema.json.
Coverage: 199/199 (100%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: move SceneManager to context_registry layer for lint-layers compliance

The lint-layers tool classifies core/ as Layer 1 (Foundation) which
cannot import from ecs/ (Layer 3). Move scene module to context_registry/
(Layer 4, Engine) which is allowed to import from ecs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reset current_scene to default when destroying active scene

Prevents panic in world()/world_mut() when the current scene is
destroyed. GoudContext::destroy_scene() now resets current_scene
to the default scene if the destroyed scene was current.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: regenerate ffi_manifest.json after merge with main

Adds 3 error query FFI functions from main (202 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: regenerate ffi_manifest.json after merge with main (211 functions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(codegen): add generic string param marshalling for C# and Python SDK generators

Scene FFI functions (goud_scene_create, goud_scene_get_by_name) accept
ptr+len string params. The codegen now handles string type params
generically instead of requiring per-function special cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: regenerate SDK files with scene string marshalling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(codegen): only apply ptr+len string marshalling for *const u8 FFI params

The generic string marshalling was incorrectly applying to all string
params including input action methods that use *const c_char (C-string).
Now checks the FFI mapping to distinguish ptr+len (*const u8) from
C-string (*const c_char) params.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(android/ui): fix error code extraction, sign-in error handling, report dismiss, atomic state updates, nav-scoped VM, lazy list keys, padding, constants

- Fix 1: PostViewModel.extractErrorCode now handles FirebaseFunctionsException, returning e.details or e.code.name instead of e.message
- Fix 2: MainActivity.signInAnonymously() now attaches addOnFailureListener to log errors instead of discarding the Task
- Fix 3: ReportBottomSheet removes unwired SnackbarHostState; calls onDismiss() directly on success
- Fix 4: OnboardingViewModel.nextPage() does read+write atomically inside a single update{} lambda
- Fix 5: AppRoot removes homeViewModel (wrong NavBackStackEntry scope); uses popUpTo(HOME){inclusive=true} to recreate HomeScreen and trigger fresh loadAll(); removes HomeViewModel.refresh()
- Fix 6: HomeScreen LazyColumn items() calls now have key lambdas (postId for PostCard, "ad_${index}" for AdCard); FeedItem.AdCard changed from object to class so each insertion is a distinct instance
- Fix 7: MyScreen loading/error Box composables now apply Scaffold padding via Modifier.padding(padding)
- Fix 8: PostViewModel PROPER_NOUN_SUFFIXES and kanjiKanaPattern moved to companion object (static, not per-instance)
- Fix 9: PostStatus object added to Models.kt with VISIBLE/HIDDEN constants; PostCard and MyScreen updated to use PostStatus instead of magic strings

Add Step 4 Test & Iterate to sandbox — 6-step flow, TestWorkerPanel, worker:test:chat endpoint, image attachments, post-publish edit

Changes the sandbox from 5 steps to 6 (Discover → Vibe → Build → Test → Distribute → Grow). Creators now test their worker as a subscriber would before publishing, with AI-generated edge case suggestions and a 3-item quality checklist.

- New TestWorkerPanel component with live worker simulation chat, edge case chips, publish gate with MD co-sign support
- New worker:test:chat backend endpoint: simulates the worker using its raas_tier_1 rules as system prompt, parses [TEST_ASSESSMENT] and [EDGE_CASES] structured tags
- New worker:update endpoint for post-publish partial edits with sensitive field re-review detection
- Image attachment support in chat (base64 vision API, transient — not stored in Firestore)
- Test session cleanup on publish (batch deletes testSessions docs)
- System prompts updated to 6-step flow in both index.js and surfaces.js

commit.message:
fix: シリアルWAV転送の速度を手動指定可能に変更 (#5)

* fix: シリアルWAV転送のチャンクサイズを縮小しCore初代に対応

M5Stack Core（初代・PSRAMなし）でシリアルWAV転送が失敗する問題を修正。
チャンクサイズを1KB→256B、送信間隔を5ms→20msに変更し、
受信バッファオーバーフローを回避。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: シリアル転送速度を固定値から--serial-chunk/--serial-delayオプションに変更

自動判定をやめ、ユーザーが速度を明示指定できるようにした。
デフォルトは高速（1024B/5ms）、低速ホストでは256B/20msに変更可能。
STATUSレスポンスにPSRAM有無を追加。SKILL.mdにトラブルシューティング追記。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: WiFiモードでsend_wavにserial専用引数が渡るバグを修正

StackchanHTTP.send_wav()はchunk_size/chunk_delayを受け付けないため、
isinstance判定でシリアル時のみ引数を渡すように修正。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add dynamic page titles for day pages: session type + race name + date

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#614c Fix: guard_response in LLM fallback path was receiving empty user_message

Root cause: LLM fallback path passed getattr(self, 'user_message', '') which
was always empty (self.user_message never set). This meant all contextual
guards in guard_response() (Vision deny patterns, distrust, placeholders)
were bypassed when pipeline didn't handle the message.

Fix: Use local user_message parameter instead of self.user_message.
Also added debug logging for Vision deny pattern detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: fetch失敗時もpiscine_resultを設定・non-piscine学生を除外

[合格81→71問題の根本原因]
外側try/exceptでエラーになった学生はpiscine_resultが
studentsに設定されず、passed_countに入らなかった。
→ except内でもresults_announced/graduated_loginsを使って
  piscine_resultを確実に設定するよう修正。

[non-piscine学生混入の修正]
missing_graduate_loginsの補填ロジックを完全に削除。
147人のpiscine cursus在籍者のみを対象とする。
begin_at >= PISCINE_STARTのcursus_42入学者は別piscine/
コホートの可能性があるため補填対象外。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Phase 8 — Student page mobile-responsive redesign

- Dialog: Full-screen on mobile, centered modal on desktop, overflow scroll
- Student cards: Mobile-first layout, safe feeAmount parsing, clickable phone
- Student table: Hidden columns on mobile, card view with full feature parity
- Expandable fee collector: Dialog on mobile (not dropdown), centered on desktop,
  fix disabled button bug, fix dead setSelectedMonthYears crash
- Student profile advanced: flex-col on mobile, shorter tab labels, responsive stats
- Monthly fee timeline: 4-col grid on mobile (was 6), reduced padding/gaps
- Duration selector: Single column on mobile, dark mode support
- All touch targets min 44px, text-base to prevent iOS auto-zoom
- All dialogs have DialogDescription for accessibility

repository.name: buakbui
repository.description: 擲筊 Buakbui — 線上 3D 擲筊模擬器  一款以 Three.js 搭配 cannon-es 物理引擎打造的線上擲筊網頁應用。透過 3D 即時渲染與真實物理碰撞模擬，重現傳統民間信仰中「擲筊問神」的儀式體驗。筊杯採用仿真月牙形建模，具備木紋質感與紅漆陰面，拋擲後依據物理引擎計算自然翻轉、彈跳與落定，最終根據兩筊的朝向自動判定「聖杯」（神明同意）、「笑杯」（笑而不語）或「蓋杯」（不同意）。支援連續聖杯計數與動畫特效，介面以霧金暖色調呈現廟宇氛圍，採用「霞鶩文楷」字體，純前端單頁實作，點擊即可擲筊，適用於桌面與行動裝置。
